pub type prelude::U32Vec = simd::generic::u32x8<archmage::tokens::generated::x86::X64V3Token>
pub mod simd
pub mod simd::backends
pub trait simd::backends::F32x16Backend: archmage::tokens::SimdToken + simd::backends::sealed::Sealed + core::marker::Copy + 'static
pub type simd::backends::F32x16Backend::Repr: core::marker::Copy + core::clone::Clone + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::abs(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::add(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::bitand(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::bitor(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::bitxor(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::blend(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::ceil(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::clamp(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::div(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::floor(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::from_array(self, [f32; 16]) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::load(self, &[f32; 16]) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::max(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::min(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::mul(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::mul_add(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::mul_sub(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::neg(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::not(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::rcp_approx(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::recip(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::reduce_add(self, Self::Repr) -> f32
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::reduce_max(self, Self::Repr) -> f32
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::reduce_min(self, Self::Repr) -> f32
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::round(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::rsqrt(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::rsqrt_approx(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::simd_eq(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::simd_ge(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::simd_gt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::simd_le(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::simd_lt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::simd_ne(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::splat(self, f32) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::sqrt(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::store(self, Self::Repr, &mut [f32; 16])
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::sub(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::to_array(self, Self::Repr) -> [f32; 16]
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Backend::zero(self) -> Self::Repr
pub trait simd::backends::F32x16Convert: simd::backends::F32x16Backend + simd::backends::I32x16Backend + archmage::tokens::SimdToken + simd::backends::sealed::Sealed + core::marker::Copy + 'static
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Convert::bitcast_f32_to_i32(self, <Self as simd::backends::F32x16Backend>::Repr) -> <Self as simd::backends::I32x16Backend>::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Convert::bitcast_i32_to_f32(self, <Self as simd::backends::I32x16Backend>::Repr) -> <Self as simd::backends::F32x16Backend>::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Convert::convert_f32_to_i32(self, <Self as simd::backends::F32x16Backend>::Repr) -> <Self as simd::backends::I32x16Backend>::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Convert::convert_f32_to_i32_round(self, <Self as simd::backends::F32x16Backend>::Repr) -> <Self as simd::backends::I32x16Backend>::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x16Convert::convert_i32_to_f32(self, <Self as simd::backends::I32x16Backend>::Repr) -> <Self as simd::backends::F32x16Backend>::Repr
pub trait simd::backends::F32x4Backend: archmage::tokens::SimdToken + simd::backends::sealed::Sealed + core::marker::Copy + 'static
pub type simd::backends::F32x4Backend::Repr: core::marker::Copy + core::clone::Clone + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::abs(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::add(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::bitand(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::bitor(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::bitxor(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::blend(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::ceil(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::div(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::floor(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::max(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::min(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::mul(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::mul_add(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::mul_sub(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::neg(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::not(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::rcp_approx(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::recip(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::reduce_add(self, Self::Repr) -> f32
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::reduce_max(self, Self::Repr) -> f32
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::reduce_min(self, Self::Repr) -> f32
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::round(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::rsqrt(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::rsqrt_approx(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::simd_eq(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::simd_ge(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::simd_gt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::simd_le(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::simd_lt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::splat(self, f32) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::sqrt(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::store(self, Self::Repr, &mut [f32; 4])

pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::to_array(self, Self::Repr) -> [f32; 4]
pub fn simd::backends::F32x4Backend::zero(self) -> Self::Repr

pub type simd::backends::F32x8Backend::Repr: core::marker::Copy + core::clone::Clone + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync

pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::div(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::min(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::mul(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::mul_add(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::mul_sub(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::not(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::rcp_approx(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::reduce_add(self, Self::Repr) -> f32
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::reduce_max(self, Self::Repr) -> f32
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::reduce_min(self, Self::Repr) -> f32

pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::rsqrt(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::rsqrt_approx(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::simd_gt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::to_array(self, Self::Repr) -> [f32; 8]
pub fn simd::backends::F32x8Backend::zero(self) -> Self::Repr

pub trait simd::backends::F64x2Backend: archmage::tokens::SimdToken + simd::backends::sealed::Sealed + core::marker::Copy + 'static
pub type simd::backends::F64x2Backend::Repr: core::marker::Copy + core::clone::Clone + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync
pub fn simd::backends::F64x2Backend::abs(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x2Backend::add(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x2Backend::bitand(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x2Backend::bitor(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::F64x2Backend::min(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::F64x2Backend::not(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x2Backend::rcp_approx(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::F64x2Backend::simd_ge(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::F64x2Backend::zero(self) -> Self::Repr
pub trait simd::backends::F64x4Backend: archmage::tokens::SimdToken + simd::backends::sealed::Sealed + core::marker::Copy + 'static
pub type simd::backends::F64x4Backend::Repr: core::marker::Copy + core::clone::Clone + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::abs(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::add(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::bitand(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::bitor(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::bitxor(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::blend(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::ceil(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::clamp(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::div(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::floor(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::from_array(self, [f64; 4]) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::load(self, &[f64; 4]) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::max(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::min(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::mul(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::mul_add(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::mul_sub(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::neg(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::not(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::rcp_approx(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::recip(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::reduce_add(self, Self::Repr) -> f64
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::reduce_max(self, Self::Repr) -> f64
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::reduce_min(self, Self::Repr) -> f64
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::round(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::rsqrt(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::rsqrt_approx(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::simd_eq(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::simd_ge(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::simd_gt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::simd_lt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::sqrt(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::F64x4Backend::store(self, Self::Repr, &mut [f64; 4])

pub fn simd::backends::I32x4Backend::simd_gt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::I32x4Backend::simd_lt(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I32x4Backend::simd_ne(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I32x4Backend::splat(self, i32) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I32x4Backend::store(self, Self::Repr, &mut [i32; 4])
pub fn simd::backends::I32x4Backend::sub(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr
pub fn simd::backends::I32x4Backend::to_array(self, Self::Repr) -> [i32; 4]
pub fn simd::backends::I32x4Backend::zero(self) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::I8x32Backend::to_array(self, Self::Repr) -> [i8; 32]
pub fn simd::backends::I8x32Backend::zero(self) -> Self::Repr
pub trait simd::backends::I8x32Bitcast: simd::backends::I8x32Backend + simd::backends::U8x32Backend + archmage::tokens::SimdToken + simd::backends::sealed::Sealed + core::marker::Copy + 'static

pub fn simd::backends::U32x8Backend::shl_const<const N: i32>(self, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub fn simd::backends::U32x8Backend::simd_ge(self, Self::Repr, Self::Repr) -> Self::Repr

pub type simd::backends::neon = archmage::tokens::generated::arm_stubs::NeonToken
pub type simd::backends::scalar = archmage::tokens::ScalarToken
pub type simd::backends::wasm128 = archmage::tokens::generated::wasm_stubs::Wasm128Token
pub type simd::backends::x64v1 = archmage::tokens::generated::x86::X64V1Token
pub type simd::backends::x64v2 = archmage::tokens::generated::x86::X64V2Token
pub type simd::backends::x64v3 = archmage::tokens::generated::x86::X64V3Token
pub type simd::backends::x64v4 = archmage::tokens::generated::x86::X64V4Token
pub type simd::backends::x86_v4x = archmage::tokens::generated::x86::X64V4xToken
pub mod simd::generic
#[repr(C)] pub struct simd::generic::f32x16<T: simd::backends::F32x16Backend>(_, _)
pub const fn simd::generic::f32x16<archmage::tokens::ScalarToken>::implementation_name() -> &'static str
pub const fn simd::generic::f32x16<archmage::tokens::generated::x86::X64V3Token>::implementation_name() -> &'static str
pub fn simd::generic::f32x16<T>::from_array(T, [f32; 16]) -> Self

pub const SimdTypes::I32_LANES: usize

## auto traits

50 types implement all of: Freeze, RefUnwindSafe, Send, Sync, Unpin, UnwindSafe
simd::generic::f32x16<T>: !Freeze !RefUnwindSafe !Unpin !UnwindSafe
